name: everything-claude-code
description: Battle-tested Claude Code configurations from an Anthropic hackathon winner — agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

metadata.description: Battle-tested Claude Code configurations from an Anthropic hackathon winner

plugins.name: everything-claude-code
plugins.description: The most comprehensive Claude Code plugin — 30 agents, 140 skills, 60 commands, and production-ready hooks. Default install gets core skills; re-run with --profile full for everything. Supports Claude, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and Antigravity.
